name: Data Representation
description: Binary, hexadecimal and how data is represented in a computer.

name: Data Transmission
description: Packets, transmission methods, error detection and encryption.

name: Hardware Part 1
description: CPU, fetch-decode-execute cycle, registers, cache, clock speed, cores and embedded systems.

name: Hardware Part 3
description: Memory, secondary storage and cloud storage.

name: Hardware Part 4
description: Input devices, output devices and sensors.

name: Software
description: Types of software, operating systems, interrupts, translation software and IDS.

name: The Internet and its Uses
description: The internet, the world wide web, URLs, HTTP and HTTPS, web browsers, cookies, digital currency and cyber security.

name: Databases
description: Tables, keys, normalisation and SQL basics.

name: Algorithm Design and Problem Solving
description: Program development life cycle, flowcharts, pseudocode, standard algorithms, validation, verification, testing and trace tables.

name: Testing and Trace Tables
description: Error types, test data and trace tables.

name: Programming Part 1
description: Data types, variables, constants, operators, assignment and string handling.

name: Programming Part 2
description: Sequence, selection and core programming logic.

name: Programming Part 3
description: Library routines, arrays, procedures and functions.

name: Object-Oriented Programming
description: Classes, objects, encapsulation, inheritance and polymorphism.
